questions.question: According to AFI 1-1, what two key aspects of individual financial responsibility should USAF members focus on?
options: Investing in stocks and maintaining a savings account
Establishing a personal budget and effective management of debt
Filing tax returns early and contributing to TSP

questions.question: Annual military pay raises are set by Congress and the U.S. President in which document?
The 1 January annual pay raise automatically matches what metric from the previous year?
options: Private sector wage increases as measured by the Employment Cost Index
Federal civilian General Schedule pay adjustments
Inflation rate as determined by the Treasury Department

questions.question: The Leave and Earnings Statement (LES) is formally titled as which DFAS form?
LES processing cutoff dates generally occur around which dates each month?
options: The 1st for mid-month and the 15th for end-of-month
The 6th for mid-month and the 20th for end-of-month
The 10th for mid-month and the 25th for end-of-month
The 5th for mid-month and the 15th for end-of-month

questions.question: The Basic Needs Allowance is available to Airmen and Guardians whose Gross Household Income places them below what percentage of Federal Poverty Guidelines?
Which types of pay are service members NOT required to pay federal or state taxes on?
options: Special duty assignment pay and hazardous duty pay
Separation pay and lump-sum leave payment

questions.question: What is the maximum monthly deduction amount for the Armed Forces Retirement Home (AFRH) from the pay of regular enlisted members?
Under the Blended Retirement System (BRS), a member who enlisted on or after 1 January 2018 will be automatically enrolled in TSP at what contribution level?
TSP automatic contributions for BRS-enrolled members begin with the first pay period following how many days of service from the Pay Entry Base Date?
What is the maximum amount of Servicemembers' Group Life Insurance (SGLI) coverage?
Under SGLI, each dependent child is covered in what amount at no cost to the member?
How many days do commanders have to attempt to respond to financial complaints against members?
For federal government collection of debts, due process notification is generally required for debts exceeding what amount?
A PCS advance payment is an advance of up to how many months of basic pay?
All Airmen who are E-3 and below must have whose approval to receive PCS advance pay?
When the expedited transportation mode for unaccompanied baggage is commercial air, what is the maximum weight that may be transported?
Within how many business days must travelers electronically file a voucher in DTS upon return to their permanent duty station?
GTCC automated teller machine cash advances may not be obtained earlier than how many working days before scheduled travel?
At what number of days past due will a GTCC account be suspended?
GTCC accounts that are how many days past due will be submitted for salary-offset processing to DFAS?
GTCC accounts that are how many days past due are considered in charged-off status, making the cardholder no longer eligible for reinstatement?
What are the three types of manpower used to conduct the USAF mission?
options: Active duty, reserve, and guard personnel
Military personnel, in-service civilian employees, and contracted services

questions.question: What is the primary document that reflects the manpower required to accomplish the unit mission?
What are the four interrelated phases of the Planning, Programming, Budgeting, and Execution (PPBE) process?
The USAF budget program operates on a fiscal year basis that runs during which period?
A financial liability investigation shall be conducted for all loss, damage, destruction, or theft of government-owned equipment with an initial acquisition cost of what amount or greater?
How is fraud defined in the context of Fraud, Waste, and Abuse prevention?
options: The extravagant, careless, or needless expenditure of USAF funds
The intentionally wrongful or improper use of USAF resources
Any intentional deception designed to unlawfully deprive the USAF of something of value or to secure an unentitled benefit
The misuse of rank, position, or authority that causes the loss of resources

questions.question: What are the three priorities of the Environmental Management System?
options: Compliance, risk reduction, and continuous improvement

questions.question: The Environmental Management System is designed with how many phases, and what are they?
options: Four phases: Plan, Do, Check, Act
Five phases: Identify, Plan, Execute, Monitor, Improve
Six phases: Survey, Plan, Execute, Monitor, Report, Improve

questions.question: The Federal Insurance Contributions Act (FICA) requires federal agencies to withhold which two taxes from the basic pay of military members?
options: Federal income tax and state income tax
Armed Forces Retirement Home and TSP contributions

questions.question: Members are not permitted to contribute more than what percentage of their basic pay to the Thrift Savings Plan (TSP)?
How do Roth TSP contributions differ from Traditional TSP contributions regarding taxation?
options: Roth contributions are taken out before taxes; Traditional contributions are taken out after taxes
Roth contributions are taken out after income is taxed and withdrawals are tax-free; Traditional contributions are taken out before taxes are computed
Both Roth and Traditional contributions are tax-deferred until withdrawal
Roth contributions receive a government match; Traditional contributions do not

questions.question: To allow for sufficient processing time, allotments should be requested how many days before the desired month?
What are the three principal goals of the Commercial Services Management Program?
options: Reduce costs, eliminate positions, and privatize operations
Sustain readiness, improve performance and quality, and focus available personnel and resources on core USAF missions
Increase military manning, reduce civilian positions, and improve audit scores
Maximize contractor support, minimize government oversight, and reduce budget requests

questions.question: At what number of days past due is the first late fee charged on a GTCC account?
What is defined as the extravagant, careless, or needless expenditure of USAF funds or the consumption of USAF property resulting from deficient practices, systems controls, or decisions?
What form is required documentation for a financial liability investigation of property loss?
Who appoints resource advisors within the resource management system?
The Future Years Defense Program (FYDP) is composed of how many major force programs?
